Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+darwin:
+  packages:
+    common:
+      brews:
+        - chezmoi
+        - direnv
+        - docutils
+        - eza
+        - git
+        - fzf
+        - lazygit
+        - mas
+        - mise
+        - mods
+        - nushell
+        - podman
+        - ripgrep
+        - sevenzip
+        - wget
+      casks:
+        - 1password
+        - 1password-cli
+        - ghostty
+        - google-chrome
+        - discord
+        - font-fira-code
+        - font-fira-code-nerd-font
+        - raycast
+        - slack
+        - visual-studio-code
+      vscode:
+        # git
+        - eamodio.gitlens
+        # gopilot
+        - github.copilot
+        - github.copilot-chat
+        # local file history
+        - xpo.local-history
+        # lua
+        - sumneko.lua
+        # markdown
+        - bierner.markdown-mermaid
+        - davidanson.vscode-markdownlint
+        - shd101wyy.markdown-preview-enhanced
+        - yzhang.markdown-all-in-one
+        
+        # prettier
+        - esbenp.prettier-vscode
+        # python
+        - ms-python.vscode-pylance
+        - ms-python.python
+        # yaml
+        - redhat.vscode-yaml
+        # vscode-intellicode
+        - visualstudioexptteam.vscodeintellicode
+        - visualstudioexptteam.intellicode-api-usage-examples
+    personal:
+      brews: []
+      casks: []
+      vscode:
+        # godot
+        - geequlim.godot-tools
+    work:
+      brews: []
+      casks: []
+      vscode:
+        # golang
+        - golang.go
+        # helm
+        - tim-koehler.helm-intellisense
+        # react
+        - dsznajder.es7-react-js-snippets
+        # terraform
+        - hashicorp.hcl
+        - hashicorp.terraform
+        - mise-vscode

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
darwin:
  packages:
    common:
      brews:
        - chezmoi
        - direnv
        - docutil
        - exa
        - eza
        - git
        - fzf
        - lazygit
        - mas
        - mise
        - mods
        - nushell
        - podman
        - ripgrep
        - 
        - sevenzip
        - wget
      casks:
        - 1password
        - 1password-cli
        - ghostty
        - google-chrome
        - discord
        - font-fira-code
        - font-fira-code-nerd-font
        - raycast
        - slack
        - visual-studio-code
      vscode:
        # git
        - eamodio.gitlens
        # gopilot
        - github.copilot
        - github.copilot-chat
        # local file history
        - xpo.local-history
        # lua
        - sumneko.lua
        # markdown
        - bierner.markdown-mermaid
        - davidanson.vscode-markdownlint
        - shd101wyy.markdown-preview-enhanced
        - yzhang.markdown-all-in-one
        # prettier
        - esbenp.prettier-vscode
        # python
        - ms-python.vscode-pylance
        - ms-python.python
        # yaml
        - redhat.vscode-yaml
        # vscode-intellicode
        - visualstudioexptteam.vscodeintellicode
        - visualstudioexptteam.intellicode-api-usage-examples
    personal:
      brews: []
      casks: []
      vscode:
        # godot
        - geequlim.godot-tools
    work:
      brews: []
      casks: []
      vscode:
        # golang
        - golang.go
        # helm
        - tim-koehler.helm-intellisense
        # react
        - dsznajder.es7-react-js-snippets
        # terraform
        - hashicorp.hcl
        - hashicorp.terraform
        - mise-vscode
